communicative_purpose: Polite, formal way to close official letters, used with assurances of respect
trigger_situations: Formal business letters, official correspondence, administrative documents
contexts: Formal written communication, diplomatic letters, official emails
variations: je vous prie d'agréer, veuille agréer, daignez agréer
common_mistakes: Forgetting the phrase continuation 'mes salutations distinguées'; incorrect capitalization
example_1: Je vous prie d'agréer, Madame, mes salutations distinguées.
example_2: Je vous prie d'agréer l'expression de mes respectueux hommages.
example_3: Je vous prie d'agréer mes sincères salutations.
example_1_translation: Please accept, Madam, my distinguished greetings.
example_2_translation: Please accept the expression of my respectful homage.

meaning: at the end of / following / after
communicative_purpose: To indicate what happens following a process, event, or time period
trigger_situations: Meetings, procedures, processes, deadlines, formal timelines
contexts: Formal written/spoken, professional contexts, administrative procedures
variations: à l'issue de, à la fin de, au terme de, après
common_mistakes: Confusing with 'pendant' (during); using with wrong preposition 'de'
example_1: À l'issue de la réunion, nous avons pris une décision.
example_2: À l'issue de la formation, vous recevrez un certificat.
example_3: À l'issue du délai imparti, le dossier sera clos.
example_1_translation: At the end of the meeting, we made a decision.
example_2_translation: At the end of the training, you will receive a certificate.
example_3_translation: At the end of the deadline, the file will be closed.

chunk_text: je me tiens à votre disposition
meaning: I remain at your disposal / I am available to you
communicative_purpose: Polite way to express willingness to help or meet with someone
trigger_situations: Business letters, customer service, scheduling meetings, professional contact
variations: je reste à votre disposition, je suis à votre entière disposition, je me tiens à votre entière disposition
common_mistakes: Agreement errors with 'se tenir'; confusing with 'être disponible'
patterns: je + me + tiens + à + votre + disposition
example_1: Je me tiens à votre disposition pour un entretien.
example_2: Je me tiens à votre disposition pour tout renseignement complémentaire.
example_3: Nous nous tenons à votre disposition pour organiser cette réunion.
example_1_translation: I am available for an interview.
example_2_translation: I am at your disposal for any further information.
example_3_translation: We are at your disposal to organize this meeting.

communicative_purpose: To indicate compliance with rules, laws, or previous agreements
trigger_situations: Legal documents, contracts, official regulations, administrative procedures
contexts: Formal written, legal/administrative contexts, official correspondence
variations: en conformité avec, selon, suivant, conformément aux
common_mistakes: Confusing preposition 'à' with 'avec'; forgetting plural agreement
example_1: Conformément à notre contrat, le paiement doit intervenir dans les trente jours.
example_2: Conformément à la réglementation en vigueur, vous devez fournir ces documents.
example_3: Conformément à votre demande, nous avons procédé à la modification.
example_1_translation: In accordance with our contract, payment must be made within thirty days.
example_2_translation: In accordance with current regulations, you must provide these documents.
example_3_translation: In accordance with your request, we have made the modification.

meaning: as soon as possible / at the earliest opportunity
communicative_purpose: To indicate that something should be done quickly or at the earliest opportunity
trigger_situations: Business requests, urgent matters, deadline setting, administrative procedures
variations: dans les meilleurs délais, dans les plus brefs délais, dans les délais les plus courts
common_mistakes: Confusing with 'rapidement' (too informal); incorrect plural agreement
example_1: Je vous prie de bien vouloir répondre dans le meilleur délai.
example_2: Veuillez nous contacter dans le meilleur délai.
example_3: Le dossier doit être traité dans le meilleur délai possible.
example_1_translation: Please respond as soon as possible.
example_2_translation: Please contact us as soon as possible.
example_3_translation: The file must be processed as quickly as possible.

meaning: I am writing to you / I am sending you this letter
communicative_purpose: To introduce the purpose of a formal letter or email
trigger_situations: Formal correspondence, official letters, administrative requests
variations: je me permets de vous adresser, je vous fais parvenir, je vous transmets
common_mistakes: Using in spoken contexts; confusing 'la présente' (this letter) with 'les présentes'
example_1: Je vous adresse la présente afin de vous informer d'un changement important.
example_2: Je vous adresse la présente pour répondre à votre demande.
example_3: Je vous adresse la présente en référence à notre conversation téléphonique.
example_1_translation: I am writing to you here to inform you of an important change.
example_2_translation: I am sending you this letter to respond to your request.
example_3_translation: I am writing this to you with reference to our telephone conversation.

communicative_purpose: To express showing or displaying a particular quality or characteristic
trigger_situations: Performance reviews, evaluations, descriptions of behavior, professional assessments
variations: montrer, manifester, témoigner de, faire montre de
common_mistakes: Confusing with 'montrer'; using wrong preposition 'de'; forgetting article before quality
example_1: Le candidat a fait preuve d'une grande motivation.
example_2: Elle a fait preuve de professionnalisme tout au long du projet.
example_3: Nous devons faire preuve de patience dans cette négociation.
example_2_translation: She demonstrated professionalism throughout the project.
example_3_translation: We must be patient in this negotiation.

chunk_text: je me permets de vous proposer
meaning: I am taking the liberty of proposing to you
communicative_purpose: Polite way to make suggestions or proposals in professional contexts
trigger_situations: Business proposals, meeting agendas, suggestions, project planning
contexts: Formal written/spoken, business meetings, professional discussions
variations: je me permets de suggérer, je me permets de vous soumettre, je vous propose
common_mistakes: Overusing 'se permettre'; using too formally in casual contexts
patterns: je + me + permets + de + vous + proposer
example_1: Je me permets de vous proposer une modification du planning initial.
example_2: Je me permets de vous proposer une solution alternative.
example_3: Je me permets de vous proposer une rencontre la semaine prochaine.
example_1_translation: I would like to suggest a modification to the initial schedule.
example_2_translation: Let me offer you an alternative solution.
example_3_translation: I would like to suggest a meeting with you next week.

meaning: I would be delighted to / I would be happy to
communicative_purpose: Polite way to express enthusiasm or willingness to do something
trigger_situations: Accepting invitations, confirming availability, business meetings
contexts: Formal written communication, business correspondence, polite social contexts
variations: je serais ravi, je serais enchanté de, je serais heureux de
common_mistakes: Agreement errors; confusing 'ravi' with 'content' in terms of register
example_1: Je serais ravi de participer à cette réunion.
example_2: Je serais ravi de vous rencontrer lors de cet événement.
example_3: Nous serions ravis de collaborer avec votre entreprise.
example_1_translation: I would be delighted to participate in this meeting.
example_2_translation: I would love to meet you at this event.
example_3_translation: We would be delighted to collaborate with your company.

meaning: with a view to / for the sake of / in an effort to
communicative_purpose: To express the reason or motivation behind an action or decision
trigger_situations: Explanations in reports, policy justifications, administrative documents
contexts: Formal written, reports, official communications, policy documents
variations: afin de, dans le but de, en vue de, avec l'objectif de
common_mistakes: Confusing with 'à cause de' (because of); using in spoken contexts where it's too formal
example_1: Dans un souci de transparence, nous publions ces résultats.
example_2: Dans un souci d'efficacité, nous avons simplifié la procédure.
example_3: Dans un souci d'équité, cette politique s'applique à tous les employés.
example_1_translation: In the interest of transparency, we are publishing these results.
example_2_translation: In the interest of efficiency, we have simplified the procedure.
example_3_translation: In the interest of fairness, this policy applies to all employees.

communicative_purpose: To emphasize that something is self-evident or obvious
trigger_situations: Emphasis in formal writing, arguments, presentations, formal discussions
contexts: Formal written/spoken, professional arguments, academic writing
variations: il va sans dire, needless to say, il va de soi que, cela va sans dire
example_1: Il va sans dire que la ponctualité est essentielle dans notre entreprise.
example_2: Il va sans dire que nous attendons un travail de qualité.
example_3: Il va sans dire que cette information reste confidentielle.
example_1_translation: It goes without saying that punctuality is essential in our business.
example_2_translation: It goes without saying that we expect quality work.
example_3_translation: It goes without saying that this information remains confidential.

meaning: I am writing to confirm / I confirm to you
communicative_purpose: To formally confirm information, arrangements, or previous discussions
trigger_situations: Confirmation emails, meeting confirmations, reservation confirmations, follow-ups
variations: je confirme, nous vous confirmons, par la présente je confirme
common_mistakes: Confusing with 'infirmer' (to refute); using in spoken contexts
example_1: Je vous confirme notre rendez-vous de demain à 14 heures.
example_2: Je vous confirme la réception de votre paiement.
example_3: Je vous confirme que nous avons bien reçu votre dossier.
example_1_translation: I confirm our meeting tomorrow at 2 p.m.
example_2_translation: I confirm receipt of your payment.
example_3_translation: I confirm that we have received your file.

communicative_purpose: To introduce additional information or a different viewpoint
trigger_situations: Formal arguments, reports, presentations, professional discussions
contexts: Formal written/spoken, business writing, academic contexts
variations: de plus, en outre, qui plus est, d'autre part
common_mistakes: Confusing with 'pourtant' (however); using in spoken contexts where it's too formal
example_1: Ce produit est efficace. Par ailleurs, il est écologique.
example_2: Par ailleurs, nous avons constaté une amélioration significative.
example_3: Le prix est compétitif. Par ailleurs, la qualité est exceptionnelle.
example_1_translation: This product is effective. Furthermore, it is ecological.
example_2_translation: Furthermore, we have seen a significant improvement.
example_3_translation: The price is competitive. Furthermore, the quality is exceptional.

communicative_purpose: Describing something happening immediately or simultaneously
trigger_situations: Technology discussions, monitoring, live events, data transmission
contexts: Technical, business, technology contexts, professional discussions
variations: en temps réel, en temps quasi-réel, de manière instantanée
common_mistakes: Using 'réel' as adjective incorrectly; agreement errors
example_1: Les données sont mises à jour en temps réel.
example_2: Vous pouvez suivre l'évolution du marché en temps réel.
example_3: Notre système permet de travailler en temps réel avec vos collègues.
example_1_translation: Data is updated in real time.
example_2_translation: You can follow market developments in real time.
example_3_translation: Our system allows you to work in real time with your colleagues.

meaning: I am pleased with / I congratulate myself on
communicative_purpose: To express satisfaction about one's own actions or achievements
trigger_situations: Self-evaluations, reports, personal achievements, formal congratulations
variations: je suis fier de, je suis satisfait de, je me réjouis de
common_mistakes: Confusing reflexive pronoun; confusing with 'féliciter quelqu'un' (to congratulate someone else)
example_1: Je me félicite d'avoir pris cette décision à temps.
example_2: L'équipe se félicite de la réussite de ce projet.
example_3: Je me félicite d'avoir pu contribuer à cette réussite collective.
example_1_translation: I am pleased to have made this decision in time.
example_2_translation: The team is delighted with the success of this project.
example_3_translation: I am pleased to have been able to contribute to this collective success.
